name: performance-testing-platform
description: Performance testing platform — k6 load/stress/spike/smoke testing with Grafana + InfluxDB

scripts.k6:soak:short: mkdir -p reports && npm run restart:clean && k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-soak-short.html' tests/performance/soak-short.k6.js
scripts.k6:soak: mkdir -p reports && npm run restart:clean && k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-soak.html' tests/performance/soak.k6.js
scripts.k6:soak:full: mkdir -p reports && npm run restart:clean && SOAK_VUS=500 SOAK_DURATION=4h k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-soak-full.html' tests/performance/soak.k6.js
scripts.k6:soak:influx: curl -sf http://localhost:8086/ping > /dev/null || { echo '❌ InfluxDB not reachable on :8086 — run: npm run docker:up'; exit 1; } && npm run restart:clean && k6 run --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6 tests/performance/soak.k6.js
scripts.k6:smoke:influx: curl -sf http://localhost:8086/ping > /dev/null || { echo '❌ InfluxDB not reachable on :8086 — run: npm run docker:up'; exit 1; } && k6 run --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6 tests/performance/smoke.k6.js
scripts.k6:load:influx: curl -sf http://localhost:8086/ping > /dev/null || { echo '❌ InfluxDB not reachable on :8086 — run: npm run docker:up'; exit 1; } && k6 run --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6 tests/performance/load.k6.js
scripts.k6:rate-limit: mkdir -p reports && RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=true RATE_LIMIT_MAX=${RATE_LIMIT_MAX:-3} npm start > /dev/null 2>&1 & k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-rate-limit.html' tests/performance/rate-limit.k6.js; npm stop
scripts.k6:breakpoint: mkdir -p reports && npm run restart:clean && k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-breakpoint.html' tests/performance/breakpoint.k6.js
scripts.jmeter:smoke: export JVM_ARGS="${JVM_ARGS:--Dhttp.proxyHost= -Dhttps.proxyHost=}" && mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-smoke results/jmeter-smoke.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/smoke.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/smoke.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-smoke.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-smoke
scripts.jmeter:load: export JVM_ARGS="${JVM_ARGS:--Dhttp.proxyHost= -Dhttps.proxyHost=}" && mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-load results/jmeter-load.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/load.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/load.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-load.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-load
scripts.jmeter:stress: export JVM_ARGS="${JVM_ARGS:--Dhttp.proxyHost= -Dhttps.proxyHost=}" && mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-stress results/jmeter-stress.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/stress.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/stress.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-stress.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-stress
scripts.jmeter:spike: export JVM_ARGS="${JVM_ARGS:--Dhttp.proxyHost= -Dhttps.proxyHost=}" && mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-spike results/jmeter-spike.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/spike.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/spike.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-spike.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-spike
scripts.jmeter:auth-load: export JVM_ARGS="${JVM_ARGS:--Dhttp.proxyHost= -Dhttps.proxyHost=}" && mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-auth-load results/jmeter-auth-load.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/auth-load.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/auth-load.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-auth-load.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-auth-load
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.capacity:test: bash scripts/preflight-check.sh && npm run restart:clean && mkdir -p reports && bash scripts/server.sh collect 1000 reports/system-metrics.csv & COLLECTOR_PID=$! && k6 run --out 'web-dashboard=export=reports/k6-capacity.html' tests/performance/capacity.k6.js; kill $COLLECTOR_PID 2>/dev/null; echo 'Capacity test complete. Reports in reports/'
